result.stderr:
Spriggit.Yaml.Fallout4 0.41.0-alpha.5+Branch.dev.Sha.81163bf19633422b907218560ed654ee399d82ce.81163bf19633422b907218560ed654ee399d82ce
2024

  -i, --InputPath         Required. Path to the Bethesda plugin

  -o, --OutputPath        Required. Dedicated folder to export mod as its text
                          representation

  -g, --GameRelease       Game release that the plugin is related to

  -p, --PackageName       Spriggit serialization nuget package name to use for
                          conversion

  -v, --PackageVersion    Spriggit serialization nuget package version to use
                          for conversion

  -t, --Threads           Maximum number of threads to use

  --Debug                 Set up for debug mode, including resetting nuget
                          caches

  -m, --ModKey            ModKey override.  If left blank, file name will be
                          used

  -c, --Check             Checks some basic correctness after serialization.
                          Not extensive.

  -d, --DataFolder        Path to the data folder to look to for mod files.
                          (Only required for separated master games, like
                          Starfield)

  -u, --ErrorOnUnknown    Whether to error on unknown fields.  Liklihood of data
                          loss is higher if turned off.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

result.stderr:
Spriggit.Yaml.Fallout4 0.41.0-alpha.5+Branch.dev.Sha.81163bf19633422b907218560ed654ee399d82ce.81163bf19633422b907218560ed654ee399d82ce
2024

  -i, --InputPath         Required. Path to the Bethesda plugin folder as its
                          Spriggit text representation

  -o, --OutputPath        Required. Path to export the mod as its Bethesda
                          plugin representation

  -p, --PackageName       Spriggit serialization nuget package to use for
                          conversion.  Leave blank to auto detect

  -v, --PackageVersion    Spriggit serialization nuget package version to use
                          for conversion.  Leave blank to auto detect

  -t, --Threads           Maximum number of threads to use

  --Debug                 Set up for debug mode, including resetting nuget
                          caches

  -b, --BackupDays        Days to keep backup plugins in the temp folder
                          (default 30)

  -l, --Localized         Forces the build to be localized if true, or
                          unlocalized if false.  If missing, the mod's flags
                          will determine localization.

  -d, --DataFolder        Path to the data folder to look to for mod files.
                          (Only required for separated master games, like
                          Starfield)

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
